title: diasperus orbiculatus
intro: Diasperus orbiculatus, also known as Globe Mallow, is a perennial plant belonging to the family Malvaceae. It is native to the southwestern United States and Mexico, and its roots and flowers have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties. The plant is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe wounds and reduce pain. Diasperus orbiculatus can be prepared as a tincture, tea, or salve to utilize its health benefits, including reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting immune function.
